calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing Re: Petition To Perpetuate Testimony Of George Mcdermand By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: McDermand's petition to perpetuate testimony of George McDermand by videotaped deposition is denied without prejudice to refiling her request to take the deposition of Mr. McDermand if she fully complies with C.C.P. 2035.030(b)(9). The request is denied because it does not specify what information Mr. McDermand is expected to testify about as to each prospective defendant and, in particular, why, as to any particular prospective defendant as to whom Mr.McDermand is expected to provide testimony different from the testimony he previously provided in his own lawsuit, why Mr. McDermand is expected to provide different testimony than he gave in his own lawsuit. Judge: Harold Kahn, Matter not reported = (220/HEK)

Ntc Of Hearing Re: Petition To Perpetuate Testimony Of George Mcdermand By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Continued To Jul-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 220
